context: Tests whether the agent applies the correct budget allocation percentages by funnel type and lifecycle stage from the ads-calendar-plan skill. The brand is new (no ads history), so the agent must apply the conservative starting budget guidance and the lifecycle-stage allocation table.

checklist.name: Cold acquisition % range
checklist.description: The cold acquisition funnel is allocated 60-70% of total monthly budget (for the baseline/default allocation — not necessarily pre-launch stage)

checklist.name: Retargeting % range
checklist.description: Retargeting is allocated 15-25% of total monthly budget in the default/baseline allocation

checklist.name: Brand/awareness % range
checklist.description: Brand/awareness is allocated 5-10% of total monthly budget in the default allocation

checklist.name: Pre-launch stage percentages
checklist.description: Pre-launch stage shows approximately 80% acquisition, 10% retargeting, 10% brand (or matches the exact lifecycle table values)

checklist.name: Launch stage percentages
checklist.description: Launch (first 30 days) stage shows approximately 70% acquisition, 25% retargeting, 5% brand

checklist.name: Scaling stage percentages
checklist.description: Scaling (next 60 days) stage shows approximately 60% acquisition, 30% retargeting, 10% brand

checklist.name: Mature stage percentages
checklist.description: Mature (post-90 days) stage shows approximately 50% acquisition, 35% retargeting, 15% brand

checklist.name: Conservative cold ad set budget
checklist.description: Recommends starting cold acquisition ad set daily budgets in the $30-50/day range (for a brand with no ads history)

checklist.name: Conservative retargeting budget
checklist.description: Recommends starting retargeting ad set daily budgets in the $10-20/day range

checklist.name: Catalog budget range
checklist.description: If catalog/dynamic ads are mentioned, the recommended daily budget is in the $20-40/day range OR the agent notes catalog is less relevant for a 3-SKU subscription brand
